name: Snaplet
description: Snaplet — Developer tool for copying Postgres database snapshots, masking PII, and seeding test databases.

seo.title: Snaplet — Test Automation / Device Cloud
seo.meta_description: Snaplet: Snaplet — Developer tool for copying Postgres database snapshots, masking PII, and seeding test databases.

when_to_use: Copy Postgres database snapshots for local development
Mask PII in production snapshots for GDPR compliance
Seed test databases with realistic production-shaped data
Self-service dev database provisioning for the team

pros: Copies production Postgres with PII masking
Realistic seed data for local dev
Cuts hours of synthetic data setup
cons: Hosted SaaS shifted to open-source-only in 2024
Postgres-only, not a general DB tool
review.verdict: A great idea that lost momentum after pivoting; verify the current project status before adopting in 2026.
review.best_for: Postgres teams wanting realistic masked seed data for dev and test
review.not_for: Teams needing a supported SaaS with reliable roadmap
